decision: Landing zones provisioned from the same shared template, each landing zone has its own parameter file and workflow.
why: Without per-zone parameter files and workflows, a team couldn't act on their landing zone without risking triggering another's redeployment.

links.note: Landing zone initial values come from joining the platform.
Each landing zone has a dedicated workflow that passes parameters to the centralized template.
The platform identity is used to create and configure landing zone resources.
The landing zone identity receives Microsoft Graph permissions at landing zone creation time.
landing zone provisioning writes environment scoped variables (resource ID) to the application repo.

violations: Generated workflow name not matching lz-* prefix — breaks fan-out discovery.
